name: Emma Wilson
bio: Former colleague who became one of my closest mentors. We usually catch up over coffee and career advice.

name: David Kim
bio: Met during an office project abroad. We still share travel plans and productivity tips regularly.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: One of my university friends. We bonded over design projects and still talk about books and films.

name: James Wright
bio: A friend from a startup networking event. We mostly connect around freelancing and remote work.

name: Sarah Chen
bio: We met in our first year at university. She is the friend I call whenever life gets messy.

name: Tom Baker
bio: My neighborhood gym buddy. We often plan weekend runs and random food trips after workouts.

name: Maya Patel
bio: We met through a local volunteering event. She always has a new book recommendation ready.

name: Alex Johnson
bio: A school friend who still messages me about old football matches and reunion plans.

name: Nina Rodriguez
bio: We met through a design workshop and still exchange ideas about branding, UI, and creative work.

name: Omar Hassan
bio: A longtime online friend who became a real-life buddy through gaming and tech meetups.

name: Priya Sen
bio: We started talking at a neighborhood book club and now catch up about books and family life.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: Travel friend from a photography tour. We keep in touch by sharing photos and trip plans.
